raw_consumer_statement:
I requested the refund I was owed for the overcharge from the company, the company is only providing copies of the charge being made, not even providing details, and American Express is not aiding any further. 
When processing the payment information for the trip on XX/XX/XXXX from XXXX to XXXX through XXXX, a XXXX XXXX discount was supposed to be applied. This is a discount XXXX and below travelers can benefit from while using trains within XXXX. Just in XXXX, while going through my statements, I tried to sort the incorrect charge with the merchant. So far I only received credit for a XXXX charge which also occurred in XX/XX/XXXX. Both tickets were purchased under the same portal and this is the only one I did not have luck getting further responses back as all their customer service is in XXXX. 
I am hereby requesting the respective refund as I was entitled the use of the XXXX XXXX ( date of birth XXXX XXXX XXXX ). 
The merchants response has only been copies of what they charged me in XXXX. 
They have not even responded to the specific XXXX adjustment I have submitted. They only responded with copies of the receipts. Attached are copies of the price during the day of the purchase in addition to the discount that should have been applied.
